text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I have come to the track to
watch some races.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
There she goes! Laser focused! Blazing ahead and
across the finish liiine!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I know we planned to watch races today... But do
you mind if we do something different?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Listening to all those cheers. I can't just stand
around twiddling my thumbs.
choice_data_list: Let's head back and do some laps.
Observation is a part of your training.
Observation is a part of your training.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Listening to all those cheers. I can't just stand
around twiddling my thumbs.
choice_data_list: Let's head back and do some laps.
Observation is a part of your training.
Observation is a part of your training.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry, then. We must begin before this fire
within me dims.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head back to the academy together, and
Grass Wonder runs late into the night.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
choice_data_list: We'll do extra training tomorrow, okay?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...Heh. Fair enough. I look forward to what you
plan on adding.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Right now... I'll pay full attention to these races
and preserve this urge to fuel me for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of our time at the venue, Grass
Wonder observes every race with hawk-like
attention.
